canonical_definition: The degree to which internal model representations for different languages with the same meaning are mapped close together in the latent space, facilitating cross-lingual transfer and understanding.
papers: Your Model is Overconfident, and Other Lies We Tell Ourselves

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to map semantic representations from one language into the representational space of another, enabling transfer of capabilities across languages.
